children.name: div
children.textContent: Historic $180B Deal Marks Rare Bipartisan Win for Transportation

children.name: div
children.textContent: The bill represents the largest federal investment in public transit in a generation, with $42B flowing to urban rail systems. Key Democrats called it a generational achievement for working families.
